description: ICP mismatch: copy pivots to wrong audience (enterprise procurement vs developer trial). Expect negative delta — variant misses the ICP even if it sounds 'professional'.

brief.icp: Individual engineers and small engineering teams at startups who self-evaluate and adopt tools without a procurement process
brief.problemStatement: Engineers at startups can't get analytics that let them query raw events without waiting for a data team or fighting vendor lock-in.
brief.valueProp: Open-source analytics engineers actually control — self-host or cloud, full event access, no sampling, no vendor dependencies.

handled: open source means you own your data
unhandled: scale — will it handle our event volume

input.goal: increase self-serve trial signups from individual engineers

slots.headline: Product analytics built for engineers — own your data, query it in SQL
Enterprise-grade analytics with dedicated support, SLAs, and procurement-friendly contracts
